targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  -- Début réel
  DATE_FORMAT(MIN(start_dt), '%d/%m %H:%i') AS real_start_short,

  -- Temps (heures)
  ROUND(SUM(worked_h), 2) AS worked_h,
  ROUND(SUM(planned_h), 2) AS planned_h,

  -- Fin théorique = début réel + planned_h
  DATE_FORMAT(
    DATE_ADD(MIN(start_dt), INTERVAL ROUND(SUM(planned_h) * 3600) SECOND),
    '%d/%m %H:%i'
  ) AS theo_end_short,

  -- Retard vs fin théorique (h) : >0 retard
  ROUND(
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(
      SECOND,
      DATE_ADD(MIN(start_dt), INTERVAL ROUND(SUM(planned_h) * 3600) SECOND),
      NOW()
    ) / 3600,
    2
  ) AS delay_vs_theo_end_h,

  -- Paramètres gauge
  ROUND(SUM(planned_h), 2) AS gauge_max_h,
  ROUND(SUM(planned_h) * 0.90, 2) AS thr_orange,
  ROUND(SUM(planned_h) * 1.00, 2) AS thr_red

FROM (
  SELECT
    OperationDescription,
    -- start réel (on prend le premier start observé sur les lignes)
    MIN(STR_TO_DATE(AdjustedStartTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s.%f')) AS start_dt,

    -- réel = somme des lignes
    SUM(COALESCE(TotalLaborRunHours_Actual, 0)) AS worked_h,

    -- prévu = une seule fois par sous-op
    MAX(COALESCE(PlannedRunHours, 0)) AS planned_h

  FROM ShopActivityHistorical
  WHERE DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
    AND WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
    AND OrderNum = '${of}'
    AND AdjustedStartTime IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY OperationDescription
) t;

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h), 2) AS worked_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS planned_h,

  /* max de gauge = planned (fixe) */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS gauge_max_h,

  /* seuils dynamiques basés sur planned */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h) * 0.90, 2) AS thr_orange,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS thr_red,

  /* infos complémentaires */
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.planned_h) - SUM(t.worked_h), 0), 2) AS remaining_h,
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 0), 2) AS delay_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS delta_h
FROM (
  SELECT
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription,
    SUM(COALESCE(s.TotalLaborRunHours_Actual, 0)) AS worked_h,
    MAX(COALESCE(s.PlannedRunHours, 0)) AS planned_h
  FROM ShopActivityHistorical s
  WHERE s.DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
    AND s.WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
    AND s.OrderNum = '${of}'
  GROUP BY
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription
) t;

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h), 2) AS worked_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS planned_h,

  /* max de gauge = planned (fixe) */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS gauge_max_h,

  /* seuils dynamiques basés sur planned */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h) * 0.90, 2) AS thr_orange,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS thr_red,

  /* infos complémentaires */
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.planned_h) - SUM(t.worked_h), 0), 2) AS remaining_h,
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 0), 2) AS delay_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS delta_h
FROM (
  SELECT
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription,
    SUM(COALESCE(s.TotalLaborRunHours_Actual, 0)) AS worked_h,
    MAX(COALESCE(s.PlannedRunHours, 0)) AS planned_h
  FROM ShopActivityHistorical s
  WHERE s.DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
    AND s.WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
    AND s.OrderNum = '${of}'
  GROUP BY
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription
) t;

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h), 2) AS worked_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS planned_h,

  /* max de gauge = planned (fixe) */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS gauge_max_h,

  /* seuils dynamiques basés sur planned */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h) * 0.90, 2) AS thr_orange,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS thr_red,

  /* infos complémentaires */
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.planned_h) - SUM(t.worked_h), 0), 2) AS remaining_h,
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 0), 2) AS delay_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS delta_h
FROM (
  SELECT
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription,
    SUM(COALESCE(s.TotalLaborRunHours_Actual, 0)) AS worked_h,
    MAX(COALESCE(s.PlannedRunHours, 0)) AS planned_h
  FROM ShopActivityHistorical s
  WHERE s.DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
    AND s.WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
    AND s.OrderNum = '${of}'
  GROUP BY
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription
) t;

panels.title: Vision par rapport au Takt Théorique

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_FORMAT(MIN(start_dt), '%d/%m %H:%i') AS real_start_short,

  ROUND(SUM(worked_h), 2)  AS worked_h,
  ROUND(SUM(planned_h), 2) AS planned_h,

  DATE_FORMAT(
    DATE_ADD(MIN(start_dt), INTERVAL ROUND(SUM(planned_h) * 3600) SECOND),
    '%d/%m %H:%i'
  ) AS theo_end_short,

  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(planned_h) - SUM(worked_h), 0), 2) AS remaining_h,

  ROUND(GREATEST(
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(
      SECOND,
      DATE_ADD(MIN(start_dt), INTERVAL ROUND(SUM(planned_h) * 3600) SECOND),
      NOW()
    ) / 3600, 0
  ), 2) AS delay_pos_h,

  -- jauge Canvas en %
  LEAST(
    ROUND(
      100 * IFNULL(SUM(worked_h) / NULLIF(SUM(planned_h), 0), 0),
      1
    ),
    200
  ) AS pct_100

FROM (
  SELECT
    OperationDescription,
    MIN(STR_TO_DATE(AdjustedStartTime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s.%f')) AS start_dt,
    SUM(COALESCE(TotalLaborRunHours_Actual, 0)) AS worked_h,
    MAX(COALESCE(PlannedRunHours, 0)) AS planned_h
  FROM ShopActivityHistorical
  WHERE DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
    AND WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
    AND OrderNum = '${of}'
    AND ('${Operation}' = 'ALL' OR OrderStepSequenceNum = '${Operation}')
    AND AdjustedStartTime IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY OperationDescription
) t;

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h), 2)  AS worked_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS planned_h,

  /* max de gauge = planned (fixe) */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS gauge_max_h,

  /* seuils dynamiques basés sur planned */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h) * 0.90, 2) AS thr_orange,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h) * 1.00, 2) AS thr_red,

  /* infos complémentaires */
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.planned_h) - SUM(t.worked_h), 0), 2) AS remaining_h,
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 0), 2) AS delay_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS delta_h

FROM (
  SELECT
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription,

    SUM(COALESCE(s.TotalLaborRunHours_Actual, 0)) AS worked_h,
    MAX(COALESCE(s.PlannedRunHours, 0))           AS planned_h

  FROM ShopActivityHistorical s
  WHERE s.DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
    AND s.WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
    AND s.OrderNum = '${of}'
    AND ('${Operation}' = 'ALL' OR s.OrderStepSequenceNum = '${Operation}')
  GROUP BY
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription
) t;

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h), 2) AS worked_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS planned_h,

  /* max de gauge = planned (fixe) */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS gauge_max_h,

  /* seuils dynamiques basés sur planned */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h) * 0.90, 2) AS thr_orange,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS thr_red,

  /* infos complémentaires */
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.planned_h) - SUM(t.worked_h), 0), 2) AS remaining_h,
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 0), 2) AS delay_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS delta_h
FROM (
  SELECT
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription,
    SUM(COALESCE(s.TotalLaborRunHours_Actual, 0)) AS worked_h,
    MAX(COALESCE(s.PlannedRunHours, 0)) AS planned_h
  FROM ShopActivityHistorical s
  WHERE s.DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
    AND s.WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
    AND s.OrderNum = '${of}'
  GROUP BY
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription
) t;

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h), 2) AS worked_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS planned_h,

  /* max de gauge = planned (fixe) */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS gauge_max_h,

  /* seuils dynamiques basés sur planned */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h) * 0.90, 2) AS thr_orange,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS thr_red,

  /* infos complémentaires */
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.planned_h) - SUM(t.worked_h), 0), 2) AS remaining_h,
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 0), 2) AS delay_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS delta_h
FROM (
  SELECT
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription,
    SUM(COALESCE(s.TotalLaborRunHours_Actual, 0)) AS worked_h,
    MAX(COALESCE(s.PlannedRunHours, 0)) AS planned_h
  FROM ShopActivityHistorical s
  WHERE s.DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
    AND s.WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
    AND s.OrderNum = '${of}'
  GROUP BY
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription
) t;

SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h), 2) AS worked_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS planned_h,

  /* max de gauge = planned (fixe) */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS gauge_max_h,

  /* seuils dynamiques basés sur planned */
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h) * 0.90, 2) AS thr_orange,
  ROUND(SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS thr_red,

  /* infos complémentaires */
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.planned_h) - SUM(t.worked_h), 0), 2) AS remaining_h,
  ROUND(GREATEST(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 0), 2) AS delay_h,
  ROUND(SUM(t.worked_h) - SUM(t.planned_h), 2) AS delta_h
FROM (
  SELECT
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription,
    SUM(COALESCE(s.TotalLaborRunHours_Actual, 0)) AS worked_h,
    MAX(COALESCE(s.PlannedRunHours, 0)) AS planned_h
  FROM ShopActivityHistorical s
  WHERE s.DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
    AND s.WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
    AND s.OrderNum = '${of}'
  GROUP BY
    s.DepartmentNum,
    s.WorkCenterNum,
    s.OrderNum,
    s.OperationDescription
) t;

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT DepartmentNum AS __value, DepartmentNum AS __text
FROM ShopActivityHistorical
WHERE DepartmentNum IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY DepartmentNum;
list.name: dept
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT DepartmentNum AS __value, DepartmentNum AS __text
FROM ShopActivityHistorical
WHERE DepartmentNum IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY DepartmentNum;

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT WorkCenterNum AS __value, WorkCenterNum AS __text
FROM ShopActivityHistorical
WHERE DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
  AND WorkCenterNum IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY WorkCenterNum;
list.name: wc
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT WorkCenterNum AS __value, WorkCenterNum AS __text
FROM ShopActivityHistorical
WHERE DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
  AND WorkCenterNum IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY WorkCenterNum;

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT OrderNum AS __value, OrderNum AS __text
FROM ShopActivityHistorical
WHERE DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
  AND WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
  AND OrderNum IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY OrderNum;
list.name: of
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT OrderNum AS __value, OrderNum AS __text
FROM ShopActivityHistorical
WHERE DepartmentNum = '${dept}'
  AND WorkCenterNum = '${wc}'
  AND OrderNum IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY OrderNum;

list.definition:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS __value, 'Toutes opérations' AS __text
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT
    CAST(OrderStepSequenceNum AS CHAR) AS __value,
    CONCAT('Op ', OrderStepSequenceNum) AS __text
  FROM ShopActivityHistorical
  WHERE DepartmentNum='${dept}'
    AND WorkCenterNum='${wc}'
    AND OrderNum='${of}'
) x
ORDER BY CASE WHEN __value='ALL' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, __text;
list.label: Operation
list.name: Operation
list.query:
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' AS __value, 'Toutes opérations' AS __text
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT

    CONCAT('Op ', OrderStepSequenceNum) AS __text
  FROM ShopActivityHistorical
  WHERE DepartmentNum='${dept}'
    AND WorkCenterNum='${wc}'
    AND OrderNum='${of}'
) x
ORDER BY CASE WHEN __value='ALL' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, __text;
